microwave_time.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed with ample time THEN 2 min BECAUSE hotter food is preferred for a longer dining experience. IF eating while watching television AND neutral THEN 1 min BECAUSE focus is on entertainment rather than food temperature. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN no microwave BECAUSE speed is prioritized over food temperature. IF eating with sauces AND energetic THEN 2 min BECAUSE a warmer meal enhances flavor. IF eating in a quiet personal setting AND fatigued THEN 1 min BECAUSE it balances warmth and quick preparation.

occlusion_relevance.user_tendencies: IF eating while watching television AND neutral THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE visibility of the TV is important. IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed THEN minimize left occlusion BECAUSE social interaction is prioritized. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN do not consider occlusion BECAUSE speed is prioritized over visibility. IF eating with another person on the left AND energetic THEN minimize left occlusion BECAUSE it enhances social interaction. IF eating while working on a laptop AND fatigued THEN minimize front occlusion BECAUSE screen visibility is crucial.

robot_speed.user_tendencies: IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN medium BECAUSE faster service is preferred. IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed THEN slow BECAUSE it allows for conversation and leisure. IF eating while watching television AND neutral THEN medium BECAUSE it balances focus between eating and viewing. IF eating with sauces AND energetic THEN medium BECAUSE it enhances the dining experience without rushing. IF eating in a quiet personal setting AND fatigued THEN slow BECAUSE it reduces the risk of errors and allows for pauses.

skewering_axis.user_tendencies: IF eating with meats AND relaxed THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE it improves bite acquisition success. IF eating with fruits AND neutral THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE smaller bites are easier to manage. IF eating in a social setting AND in a hurry THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE it reduces time spent on bite acquisition. IF eating with desserts AND energetic THEN perpendicular to major axis BECAUSE it enhances the eating experience. IF eating with limited mouth opening AND fatigued THEN parallel to major axis BECAUSE it minimizes effort.

web_interface_confirmation.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND neutral THEN yes BECAUSE it avoids errors in a potentially distracting environment. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN no BECAUSE speed is prioritized over confirmation. IF eating while watching television AND relaxed THEN yes BECAUSE it ensures accuracy without interrupting viewing. IF eating with sauces AND energetic THEN no BECAUSE it allows for a more dynamic dining experience. IF eating in a quiet personal setting AND fatigued THEN yes BECAUSE it reduces the risk of errors.

transfer_mode.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed THEN outside mouth transfer BECAUSE it allows for easier conversation. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE it is quicker. IF eating with limited neck mobility AND neutral THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating with desserts AND energetic THEN outside mouth transfer BECAUSE it enhances the dining experience. IF eating while watching television AND fatigued THEN inside mouth transfer BECAUSE it minimizes effort.

outside_mouth_distance.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed THEN far BECAUSE it allows for more social interaction. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN near BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF eating with limited neck mobility AND neutral THEN near BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating with fruits AND energetic THEN medium BECAUSE it enhances the dining experience. IF eating while watching television AND fatigued THEN near BECAUSE it minimizes effort.

robot_ready_cue.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed THEN speech BECAUSE it is less intrusive. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN LED BECAUSE it is quicker. IF eating while watching television AND neutral THEN speech + LED BECAUSE it ensures the cue is noticed. IF eating with desserts AND energetic THEN speech BECAUSE it enhances the dining experience. IF eating in a quiet personal setting AND fatigued THEN LED BECAUSE it minimizes distractions.

bite_initiation_feeding.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed THEN button BECAUSE it avoids confusion with talking. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN autocontinue BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF eating with limited arm mobility AND neutral THEN open mouth BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating with fruits AND energetic THEN button BECAUSE it allows for precise control. IF eating while watching television AND fatigued THEN open mouth BECAUSE it minimizes effort.

bite_initiation_drinking.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed THEN button BECAUSE it avoids confusion with talking. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN autocontinue BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF drinking with limited arm mobility AND neutral THEN open mouth BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF drinking with desserts AND energetic THEN button BECAUSE it allows for precise control. IF drinking while watching television AND fatigued THEN open mouth BECAUSE it minimizes effort.

bite_initiation_wiping.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed THEN button BECAUSE it avoids confusion with talking. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN autocontinue BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF wiping with limited arm mobility AND neutral THEN open mouth BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF wiping with desserts AND energetic THEN button BECAUSE it allows for precise control. IF wiping while watching television AND fatigued THEN open mouth BECAUSE it minimizes effort.

robot_bite_available_cue.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed THEN speech BECAUSE it is less intrusive. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN LED BECAUSE it is quicker. IF eating while watching television AND neutral THEN speech + LED BECAUSE it ensures the cue is noticed. IF eating with desserts AND energetic THEN speech BECAUSE it enhances the dining experience. IF eating in a quiet personal setting AND fatigued THEN LED BECAUSE it minimizes distractions.

bite_completion_feeding.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed THEN button BECAUSE it avoids confusion with talking. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN autocontinue BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF eating with limited arm mobility AND neutral THEN perception BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating with fruits AND energetic THEN button BECAUSE it allows for precise control. IF eating while watching television AND fatigued THEN perception BECAUSE it minimizes effort.

bite_completion_drinking.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed THEN button BECAUSE it avoids confusion with talking. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN autocontinue BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF drinking with limited arm mobility AND neutral THEN perception BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF drinking with desserts AND energetic THEN button BECAUSE it allows for precise control. IF drinking while watching television AND fatigued THEN perception BECAUSE it minimizes effort.

bite_completion_wiping.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed THEN button BECAUSE it avoids confusion with talking. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN autocontinue BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF wiping with limited arm mobility AND neutral THEN perception BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF wiping with desserts AND energetic THEN button BECAUSE it allows for precise control. IF wiping while watching television AND fatigued THEN perception BECAUSE it minimizes effort.

retract_between_bites.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed THEN yes BECAUSE it allows for more social interaction. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN no BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF eating with limited neck mobility AND neutral THEN yes BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating with fruits AND energetic THEN yes BECAUSE it enhances the dining experience. IF eating while watching television AND fatigued THEN no BECAUSE it minimizes effort.

bite_dipping_preference.user_tendencies: IF eating with sauces AND relaxed THEN dip food in sauce BECAUSE it enhances flavor. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN do not dip BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF eating with limited arm mobility AND neutral THEN do not dip BECAUSE it reduces effort. IF eating with desserts AND energetic THEN dip food in sauce BECAUSE it enhances the dining experience. IF eating in a quiet personal setting AND fatigued THEN do not dip BECAUSE it minimizes effort.

amount_to_dip.user_tendencies: IF eating with sauces AND relaxed THEN more BECAUSE it enhances flavor. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN not applicable BECAUSE dipping is not preferred. IF eating with limited arm mobility AND neutral THEN not applicable BECAUSE dipping is not preferred. IF eating with desserts AND energetic THEN more BECAUSE it enhances the dining experience. IF eating in a quiet personal setting AND fatigued THEN not applicable BECAUSE dipping is not preferred.

wait_before_autocontinue_seconds.user_tendencies: IF eating in a social setting AND relaxed THEN 1000 BECAUSE it allows for more social interaction. IF eating alone AND in a hurry THEN 10 BECAUSE it speeds up the process. IF eating with limited arm mobility AND neutral THEN 100 BECAUSE it balances speed and control. IF eating with desserts AND energetic THEN 100 BECAUSE it enhances the dining experience. IF eating while watching television AND fatigued THEN 1000 BECAUSE it allows for pauses.

skewering_axis.rationale: Parallel skewering minimizes effort for users with limited mouth opening and fatigue.

transfer_mode.rationale: Inside mouth transfer minimizes effort, suitable for the user's slower state.

wait_before_autocontinue_seconds.rationale: A longer wait allows for pauses, suitable for a fatigued user.

web_interface_confirmation.rationale: Confirmation reduces the risk of errors, important due to the user's fatigue.
